# Zivvy

> Zivvy by Vestcodes is business software on an open ERP core. Sales, stock, accounting, HR, projects, and manufacturing in one product.

## About

- Product: Zivvy — https://zivvy.xyz
- Company: Vestcodes Co, India
- Contact: contact@vestcodes.com
- Pricing: Free / Pro ($15/seat/mo) / Business ($25/seat/mo) — see /pricing

## Public pages

- Home: https://zivvy.xyz/
- Features: https://zivvy.xyz/features
- Pricing: https://zivvy.xyz/pricing
- Contact: https://zivvy.xyz/contact
- Blog: https://zivvy.xyz/blog

## Legal

- Terms: https://zivvy.xyz/terms
- Privacy: https://zivvy.xyz/privacy
- Cookies: https://zivvy.xyz/cookies
- Acceptable use: https://zivvy.xyz/acceptable-use

## Stack

- Built on Frappe and ERPNext (GPLv3)
- Frontend: Next.js on Vercel
- Backend: Frappe on Railway
- Billing: Polar
- Email: Resend
